title: Verify Locked Content State for Paused/Cancelled Users
description: Tests that a user who has paused or cancelled their trial sees the content sections in the Trial Corner as locked and inaccessible.
preconditions: User has a paused or cancelled trial.
User is in the target cohort.

steps.description: 1. Log in and navigate to the Homepage.
2. Click the widget/pill for the paused/cancelled trial.
3. On the Trial Corner hub, scroll down to the content sections (Engagement, Trending).
4. Attempt to click or interact with a content item.

expected_result: The content sections should be visually locked (e.g., greyed out with a lock icon). Clicking on content should not initiate playback or lead to a content details page.
